body: [{"ac":1,"text":"FEAT-008 spec updated with Run-detail-page subsection + trust-boundary statement + evidence whitelist.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"FEAT-010 spec updated with extended Run resolver contract + drain-time persistence note + ToolCallEntry definition.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... passes.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"description drops commitment \"non_scope:Frontend implementation (that is Story 16.1 and 16.2).\"","fingerprint":"9a9f3e7563c088c6559b50170a909615619d5996d3af04d242043c3656f19c85","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"rewrite_rejected","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.rewrite_rejected","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"Doc-only bead, so criteria 3 and 4 are waived, and the body is narrow enough for a sub-agent to identify FEAT-008 and FEAT-010 as the target docs; however the title is not imperative/subsystem-scoped, the description lacks file:line-grounded current-state evidence, acceptance omits the required `lefthook run pre-commit` gate, labels are missing `area:` and `kind:`, and deps are not declared as a tracker field.","score":3,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative subsystem change, e.g. `Update FEAT-008 and FEAT-010 specs for run-detail trust boundary and resolver contract`.","Add explicit current-state or root-cause file:line citations for FEAT-008 and FEAT-010, and remove the duplicated broad-vs-part-1 PROPOSED FIX block.","Replace acceptance with verifiable lines that include `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add `area:*` and `kind:*` labels plus a concrete cross-reference label such as `spec:FEAT-008`/`spec:FEAT-010`.","Add a deps field listing `ddx-f04faa86` and `ddx-4cd64068`, or state `No deps.` if that is intentional."],"waivers_applied":["doc-only (criteria 3 and 4)"]}
